data: Nuove esplorazioni nelle catacombe di S. Giovanni nel 1894
Paolo Orsi, «Nuove esplorazioni nelle catacombe di S. Giovanni nel 1894», Notizie degli Scavi di Antichità, 1895, 477–521

Coarse-grained, banded, white marble, likely Aphrodisian, Parian-2, Parian-3, Parian-4, Proconnesian, Thasian-3. Digital microscopy: homeoblastic to heteroblastic fabric (identification based on digital microscopy)
Text preserved on 4 straight lines, letters added above by ancient hand on lines 1 and 2. Traces of guide lines visible.
Photo 2017 courtesy Museo Archeologico Regionale Paolo Orsi (Aut. Assessorato Beni Culturali Regione Siciliana n.10681 del 06/05/2014)

Fine-grained, banded, grey marble, likely Aphrodisian, Proconnesian, Hymettan, Pentelic, Lunense, Ephesian_scritto. Digital microscopy: homeoblastic to heteroblastic fabric (identification based on pXRF, digital microscopy)
The text fills the available space, appearing therefore to have been engraved after the damaged to the right and lower edges.
Lunate epsilon and sigma, cursive alpha and mu.
